item.title: Warehousing Barcode Labels [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Warehousing Barcode Labels [Financial]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabeldesign1
item.itunes:summary:
Warehousing Barcode Labels
(Financial)
If you want to design handmade barcode stickers for retail business, you should download advanced Warehousing Barcode Labels maker software from www.barcodelabeldesign.com website that helps to create and print rich quality industrial barcode tags for manufacturing product labeling.Warehousing Barcode Labels maker software designs handmade industrial barcodes.
[read more]

item.title: Bulk Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Company introduces Bulk Messaging Software with more facilities on URL www.bulksmsgroup.com that easily works with different multi USB modem for sending bulk SMS in Unicode language from PC to any network mobile user in fastest way. Advance and reliable mobile messaging application provides best capabilities to successfully deliver bulk messages in a created group of mobile number and provides best facility to skip duplicate number entry while sending SMS from PC to any mobile user contact.

[read more]

Advance and reliable mobile messaging application provides best capabilities to successfully deliver bulk messages in a created group of mobile number and provides best facility to skip duplicate number entry while sending SMS from PC to any mobile user contact.

[read more]

Company introduces Bulk Messaging Software with more facilities on URL www.bulksmsgroup.com that easily works with different multi USB modem for sending bulk SMS in Unicode language from PC to any network mobile user in fastest way. Advance and reliable mobile messaging application provides best capabilities to successfully deliver bulk messages in a created group of mobile number and provides best facility to skip duplicate number entry while sending SMS from PC to any mobile user contact.

item.title: Mobile Bulk Sms [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Bulk Sms [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Bulk Sms
(Chat & Messenging)
Easy to access Mobile Bulk SMS application. Personalized Mobile Bulk SMS software sends unlimited group text messages. Professional Mobile Bulk SMS utility is available on company website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com provides delay in delivery option for sending unlimited group text messages to friends and family members globally without requiring internet connection. Extremely advanced unique quality Mobile Bulk SMS tool is fabricated by experienced technicians to simple send multiple text messages to listed contacts in just few easy steps without expert advice. You can download featured free trial version from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com.

[read more]

You can download featured free trial version from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com.

Extremely advanced unique quality Mobile Bulk SMS tool is fabricated by experienced technicians to simple send multiple text messages to listed contacts in just few easy steps without expert advice. You can download featured free trial version from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com.

item.title: Bulk SMS PC to Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS PC to Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS PC to Mobile
(Chat & Messenging)
Advance and reliable text sms broadcasting program is designed to deliver entertainment news to all users mobile phone from computer system. Easy to use text messaging application allows you to communicate with relatives and friends at free of cost through messages. Latest and technical online sms software is created to send bank account related information to all users at any time from PC. Bulk SMS PC to Mobile tool is developed to send free festive offers and tips to all mobile users from laptop or personal computer. Easy to use bulk sms application allows business industries to advertise products and services at free of cost through text sms. SMS sending tool sends unlimited free messages over any mobile network. Technical PC to mobile messaging software is used to deliver local and national market news at free of cost to all mobile users. Advance online sms utility is the best way to improve business marketing through text messages. Download PC to mobile sms program at www.bulksmsgroup.com. Easy to handle and professional bulk sms software is designed to deliver national and international current news to all mobile users at free of cost from computer device. Easy to use PC to mobile messaging tool is used to send get well soon messages at free of cost from computer device. Bulk sms program provides the best way to keep in touch with friends, relatives and family members through sms. Features: * Advance bulk sms application allows you to communicate with other people at free of cost over any mobile network. * Easy to handle online sms utility is designed to transmit reminders, special offers and other information to multiple users at any time. * Latest Bulk SMS PC to Mobile software is created to send event alerts to number of users at same time across the world. * Technical and innovative PC to mobile messaging application is used to send thousands of free sms to multiple users from personal computer or laptop.

[read more]

item.title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.04.1 13/09/2024
cpp qt6 application and appimage

first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

qml files could be updated with your repo
do not install my template theme
after two weeks of this date 13/09/2024
or it has been some time since my release
you can backup and install your theme
you build on breeze light on another computer ofcourse

i will try to keep this more updated
ive tested v1.04.1 .desktop layout in a vm and it works fine
with latest Arch kde plasma packages
your back will be created in the applications folder in /opt


new v1.04.1
simply extract .zip to /opt
and run the downloaded .desktop file


v1.04.1
new .desktop and cpp layout
added my theme changer
more info shown in photos


v1.04 13/09/2024
was a scrapped appimage i removed




v1.03 30/07/24
i removed my other 2 templates
updated my first template
updated the app to allow installation from any folder
this can be a folder within a folder
all has been tested and works well
new bash file simply execute the file run.sh and application will start
old v1.01 incase you like my konsole script


v1.02 28/07/2024
updated qml application making it look nicer
all functions work same as before
v1.01 incase you like my old version
guide to cloning and backing up your plasma theme is the same

v1.01
standard python script with functions for cloning and installing
gui application it was buggy thats why i updated

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

v1.05 not released yet..........
things being considered
adding plasma sounds to the mix
adding sddm login photos to the mix
adding plasma window decorations into the mix
not to sure if v1.03 fixes the breeze light only issue
but i will test when i have the chance
if not i have plans to add this into the mix

any help or feedback towards this project would be nice
leave a comment make a suggestion
support my work on paypal with link below
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.description:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.04.1 13/09/2024
cpp qt6 application and appimage

first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

qml files could be updated with your repo
do not install my template theme
after two weeks of this date 13/09/2024
or it has been some time since my release
you can backup and install your theme
you build on breeze light on another computer ofcourse

i will try to keep this more updated
ive tested v1.04.1 .desktop layout in a vm and it works fine
with latest Arch kde plasma packages
your back will be created in the applications folder in /opt


new v1.04.1
simply extract .zip to /opt
and run the downloaded .desktop file


v1.04.1
new .desktop and cpp layout
added my theme changer
more info shown in photos


v1.04 13/09/2024
was a scrapped appimage i removed




v1.03 30/07/24
i removed my other 2 templates
updated my first template
updated the app to allow installation from any folder
this can be a folder within a folder
all has been tested and works well
new bash file simply execute the file run.sh and application will start
old v1.01 incase you like my konsole script


v1.02 28/07/2024
updated qml application making it look nicer
all functions work same as before
v1.01 incase you like my old version
guide to cloning and backing up your plasma theme is the same

v1.01
standard python script with functions for cloning and installing
gui application it was buggy thats why i updated

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

v1.05 not released yet..........
things being considered
adding plasma sounds to the mix
adding sddm login photos to the mix
adding plasma window decorations into the mix
not to sure if v1.03 fixes the breeze light only issue
but i will test when i have the chance
if not i have plans to add this into the mix

any help or feedback towards this project would be nice
leave a comment make a suggestion
support my work on paypal with link below
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.04.1 13/09/2024
cpp qt6 application and appimage

first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

qml files could be updated with your repo
do not install my template theme
after two weeks of this date 13/09/2024
or it has been some time since my release
you can backup and install your theme
you build on breeze light on another computer ofcourse

i will try to keep this more updated
ive tested v1.04.1 .desktop layout in a vm and it works fine
with latest Arch kde plasma packages
your back will be created in the applications folder in /opt


new v1.04.1
simply extract .zip to /opt
and run the downloaded .desktop file


v1.04.1
new .desktop and cpp layout
added my theme changer
more info shown in photos


v1.04 13/09/2024
was a scrapped appimage i removed




v1.03 30/07/24
i removed my other 2 templates
updated my first template
updated the app to allow installation from any folder
this can be a folder within a folder
all has been tested and works well
new bash file simply execute the file run.sh and application will start
old v1.01 incase you like my konsole script


v1.02 28/07/2024
updated qml application making it look nicer
all functions work same as before
v1.01 incase you like my old version
guide to cloning and backing up your plasma theme is the same

v1.01
standard python script with functions for cloning and installing
gui application it was buggy thats why i updated

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

v1.05 not released yet..........
things being considered
adding plasma sounds to the mix
adding sddm login photos to the mix
adding plasma window decorations into the mix
not to sure if v1.03 fixes the breeze light only issue
but i will test when i have the chance
if not i have plans to add this into the mix

any help or feedback towards this project would be nice
leave a comment make a suggestion
support my work on paypal with link below
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]

item.title: Blackberry Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Blackberry Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Blackberry Mobile SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Sends international text messages. To forward multiple standard messages use Blackberry Mobile SMS Software. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is capable to broadcast international text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps without required any internet gateway from PC to cell phone. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is able to forward thousands number of text messages and notification from laptop to group of mobile phone numbers. Sms sender tool that provides facility to load mobile contact details and numbers from text file which saved in your computer or laptop and even from your mobile phone.

[read more]
item.description:
Blackberry Mobile SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Sends international text messages. To forward multiple standard messages use Blackberry Mobile SMS Software. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is capable to broadcast international text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps without required any internet gateway from PC to cell phone. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is able to forward thousands number of text messages and notification from laptop to group of mobile phone numbers. Sms sender tool that provides facility to load mobile contact details and numbers from text file which saved in your computer or laptop and even from your mobile phone.

[read more]

item.title: Online Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Online Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Online Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Do you want to promote your business products in cost effective manner? Just use Online Bulk SMS Software from www.bulksmsgroup.com that is instant text messaging tool to broadcast large number of notification, alerts, greetings, share market information and business campaign at different worldwide mobile networks without any internet connection. SMS sender program is useful for business users to increase their company revenues and sales by sending advertisements, sales offers, update market information, taking feedback regarding your products, etc to thousands of mobile clients.

[read more]

item.title: Software Barcode Label [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Software Barcode Label [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabeldesign1
item.itunes:summary:
Software Barcode Label
(Office Apps)
Software Barcode Label presents in www.barcodelabeldesign.com that allows user to copy and paste created bar code labels in different types of Windows applications without any hassle. See url https://www.barcodelabeldesign.com for more details.Software Barcode Label generates high resolution bar code pictures.
[read more]

item.title: GSM Mobile Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Mobile Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Mobile Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Now you can send thousands of messages in just single mouse of click via GSM Mobile Messaging software which is freely available on website www.bulksmsgroup.com at very cheap cost. Program is the comprehensive tool for mobile marketing purposes and easily compose text SMS in multiple languages such as English, Chinese, Russian etc for product promotion purposes across worldwide location and selected contact numbers.

[read more]
